matcha.censoring_note: first Heating fires within 4 weeks of the first classifiable week: the trend was already building when the observation window opened (history starts 2022-01), so this flag date is a lower bound, not a detection date. The conservative in-window flag is reported alongside.

protein_snacks.censoring_note: first Heating fires within 4 weeks of the first classifiable week: the trend was already building when the observation window opened (history starts 2022-01), so this flag date is a lower bound, not a detection date. The conservative in-window flag is reported alongside.
